title: Algorithms and Data Structures Connections Quiz

listOfQuestions.question: Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A collection where the most recently added item is removed first?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A collection where the earliest added item is removed first?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A structure that maps keys to buckets for fast lookup?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A tree where each node has at most two children?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A tree-based structure that keeps the highest or lowest priority item easy to remove?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A set of vertices connected by edges?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A graph search that explores one path deeply before backtracking?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A graph search that explores nearby vertices before moving farther away?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A search method that repeatedly narrows a sorted range?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A sorting method that sorts smaller parts and combines them?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A sorting method that partitions data around a pivot?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A method that reuses solutions to overlapping subproblems?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A method that chooses the best immediate option at each step?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A method that tries choices and abandons paths that cannot succeed?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: Storing function results so repeated calls can be answered quickly?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A way to describe how resource use grows with input size?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A sort that keeps equal items in their original relative order?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: An ordering of dependent tasks so prerequisites come first?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A sequence of values stored so each item can be accessed by position?
Which Algorithms and Data Structures concept is described by this clue: A chain of nodes where each node points to another node?
